{{Quote|All right, friend, if you'll come with me, I'll see that you get out of town safely.|Darial Anglethorn, to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="SW66" />}}
'''Prosperity''' was the largest town on the desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Beheboth]].<ref name="beheboth">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040603behebothmain|text=Beheboth: Blood and Water|int=Beheboth: Blood and Water}}</ref> Once a hardscrabble settlement mostly populated by [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]] workers, the town was originally named '''Garrotine''',<ref name="SW66" /> but was renamed after an economic revival brought about by a rare downpour of rain caused by the [[Tirrith]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Within five years, Prosperity had grown greatly in size, going from a town with just one small [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] to over a dozen. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], local moisture farmer [[Darial Anglethorn]] was elected peacekeeper of Prosperity, while also serving as the planet's first representative in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].<ref name="beheboth" />
